## Test Admission Gate

Classification:

- [ ] Behavior / public contract change
- [ ] Bug regression
- [ ] Characterization / protection test
- [ ] Documentation contract
- [ ] Release / packaging / cache operation
- [ ] Refactor only

Repository tests added or changed:

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, explain the externally observable contract they protect:


## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] `python -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] `python -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

Skipped checks:


## Manifest or documentation impact

- [ ] Plugin metadata changed
- [ ] Skill protocol or public lifecycle changed
- [ ] README / contribution docs changed
- [ ] No public documentation impact
